flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Salt Lake Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (27.0% → 23.6%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Salt Lake Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.7k → $14.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Salt Lake Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
